text_original: Null Punkte. Es soll Geld kosten... Für Was?
text_zh: 零分。这需要花钱……干什么？
reply_original: Hi there! We're sorry to hear you're unsure about the value of our paid features. Our premium membership offers exclusive benefits like unlimited chats, memory retention, and customizable dialogue styles to enhance your experience.
reply_zh: 你好！很抱歉听到您对我们的付费功能价值存在疑虑。我们的高级会员提供独家福利，如无限次聊天、对话记忆功能以及可定制的对话风格，以提升您的体验。
